description: 25 levels of nested divs each with distinct border-left color and background, testing renderer stack depth handling
visual_assertions: Each nesting level should show a distinct colored left border (cycling through the rainbow spectrum)
Each level should be indented further to the right than the previous due to accumulated padding-left
The 'Level N' labels should appear in small gray text at each nesting level
The deepest level content ('Content at the deepest nesting level') should be bold and dark colored
Background colors should subtly differ at each level due to the rgba color with increasing opacity
The renderer should not crash or truncate at any nesting level up to 25
